summary: Added a direct bridge from Chapter 16's quarry closure into Vautrin's office scene and tightened the final line so the chapter exits toward the prison-and-paper withholding that opens Chapter 18.
edits: Anchored the opening paragraph to Lucien's transport east and the sealing of the quarry mouth.
Adjusted the closing sentence to frame the notebook as resistance to state withholding in prison and on paper.
